properties.displayName: Citrix DaaS Audit & Sessions (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorUiConfig.title: Citrix DaaS Audit & Sessions (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Ingest configuration audit logs and session activity from Citrix DaaS (Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops service). Provides audit trails for security investigations, compliance monitoring, and operational troubleshooting.

dataTypes.name: CitrixDaaSConfigOps_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixDaaSConfigOps_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: CitrixDaaSSessions_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixDaaSSessions_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Citrix Cloud API Access
customs.description: Required permissions: Citrix Cloud API client credentials with read access to CVAD Manage APIs

instructionSteps.title: Configure Citrix Cloud API Access
instructionSteps.description:
Follow these steps to enable API access:

1. Log in to **Citrix Cloud** console
2. Navigate to **Identity and Access Management** > **API Access**
3. Click **Create Client** (Secure Client)
4. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret**
5. Note your **Customer ID** and **Site ID** (Instance ID)

To collect logs from multiple Citrix tenants, add a separate connection for each tenant. Every record is tagged with its **CitrixCustomerId** so you can differentiate tenants.

parameters.label: Add Citrix tenant
parameters.title: Add Citrix DaaS Connection
parameters.subtitle: Connect to the Citrix DaaS REST API

parameters.content:
## Authentication

Provide the Citrix Cloud API credentials for the tenant. These are used to obtain a bearer token for the CVAD Manage APIs.

parameters.text: Create a separate connection for each Citrix tenant you want to collect logs from.

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnotempty(FormattedEndTime), todatetime(FormattedEndTime), iff(isnotempty(FormattedStartTime), todatetime(FormattedStartTime), now())) , OperationId = ['Id'] , OperationText = ['Text'] , AdminMachineIp = ['AdminMachineIP'] , StartTime = ['FormattedStartTime'] , EndTime = ['FormattedEndTime'] | project TimeGenerated , OperationId , OperationText , User , UserIdentity , Source , AdminMachineIp , StartTime , EndTime , IsSuccessful , OperationType , CitrixCustomerId

source | extend TimeGenerated = iff(isnotempty(FormattedStartTime), todatetime(FormattedStartTime), now()) , SessionId = ['Id'] , UserName = ['UntrustedUserName'] , StartTime = ['FormattedStartTime'] , StateChangeTime = ['FormattedStateChangeTime'] , ConnectionProtocol = tostring(Connection.Protocol) , ConnectedViaIp = tostring(Connection.ConnectedViaIP) , ClientIpAddress = tostring(Client.IPAddress) , ClientName = tostring(Client.Name) | project TimeGenerated , SessionId , SessionType , State , AppState , UserName , StartTime , StateChangeTime , IsAnonymousUser , ConnectionProtocol , ConnectedViaIp , ClientIpAddress , ClientName , CitrixCustomerId

properties.displayName: Citrix DaaS Audit & Sessions (via Codeless Connector Framework)

connectorDefinitionName.defaultValue: Citrix DaaS Audit & Sessions (via Codeless Connector Framework)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The Citrix DaaS solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides the capability to ingest configuration audit logs and session activity from Citrix DaaS (Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops service) into Microsoft Sentinel using the Citrix CVAD Manage REST APIs. It provides audit trails for security investigations, compliance monitoring, and operational troubleshooting. Multiple Citrix tenants can be connected from a single data connector, with each record tagged with its Citrix Customer ID for multi-tenant differentiation.

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This Solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs:

• Microsoft Sentinel Codeless Connector Framework

Data Connectors: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
